# Feature Matrix: Benefits & Copy Angles

This matrix maps StableStream features to user benefits and recommended messaging for different audiences.

## Features, Benefits & Copy Angles

| Feature | Technical | Retail Benefit | Institutional Benefit | Developer Benefit | Copy Angle | Example Copy |
|---------|-----------|----------------|----------------------|-------------------|------------|--------------|
| **Yield Routing** | Autonomous routing to Aave V3, Compound V3, or Unichain staking | Earn real APY (2.8–3.2%) without active management | Capital deployed across verified yield sources; reduces idle capital drag | Custom adapters enable protocol extensibility | Lead with passive income + autonomy; explain mechanism for institutions | "Earn Compound's 2.8% or Aave's 3.2% on USDC — automatically routed when your position exits range." |
| **Reactive Automation** | RangeMonitorRSC monitors events via Reactive Network | Set-and-forget; no buttons to click, no human intervention | Trustless, decentralized monitoring; no reliance on keeper bots or centralized oracle | Event-driven architecture enables custom monitoring strategies | Emphasize "no buttons", "decentralized", "trustless" | "Reactive Network monitors your position 24/7. When you exit range, capital routes autonomously — no centralized intermediary." |
| **Hook Architecture** | Native Uniswap v4 integration (beforeSwap, afterSwap lifecycle) | Seamless integration with Uniswap; recognizable interface | Composable, audited, native integration with leading DEX | Build custom strategies on proven hook patterns | Technical but emphasize reliability + composability | "Built on Uniswap v4 hooks. Integrate yield routing natively into your liquidity management workflow." |
| **NFT Positions** | On-chain composable position tracking with yield history | Track your positions and earnings history on-chain | Transparent, auditable position data; on-chain composability for risk models | Programmatically access position data for custom UIs or adapters | Emphasize transparency + auditability | "Every position is an NFT on-chain. Track earnings history and compose with other protocols — full transparency." |
| **Risk Engine** | Deterministic APY validation; prevents on-chain manipulation attacks | Protection from yield overstatement; verified APY before routing | Institutional-grade risk controls; protects LP capital from slashing | Deterministic oracles reduce reliance on centralized price feeds | Lead with "institutional risk controls", "verified APY" | "Our Risk Engine validates APY on-chain before routing. No manipulation, no surprises — institutional-grade safeguards." |
| **Dynamic Fees** | Fees adjust based on real-time APY verification | You pay only when yield opportunity is real; transparent pricing | Proportional fee structure; aligns incentives between protocol and LPs | Extensible fee model; adapters can define custom fee logic | Emphasize value alignment + transparency | "Fees adjust dynamically based on real-time yield opportunities. You only pay when StableStream earns you money." |
| **Capital Efficiency** | Redeploys idle liquidity from out-of-range positions | Never lose opportunity cost again; maximize capital deployment | Recapture yield from >50% of positions often in out-of-range | Better capital efficiency = higher returns for composing strategies | Lead with "efficiency" + compare to status quo | "Out-of-range liquidity is dead capital everywhere else. StableStream brings it back to life." |

## Messaging Priorities by Audience

### Retail Users (Simplicity + Income)
**Top 3 features to emphasize:**
1. Passive yield + autonomy (no buttons)
2. Real APY numbers (Compound 2.8%, Aave 3.2%)
3. Easy onboarding (just connect wallet, deposit USDC)

**Avoid:** Risk Engine details, adapter architecture, fee mechanics — keep it simple.

### Institutional Investors (Efficiency + Trust)
**Top 3 features to emphasize:**
1. Risk Engine + trustless APY validation
2. Reactive RSC (decentralized, not centralized oracle)
3. Capital efficiency gains + composability

**Include:** On-chain audits, mechanism details, institutional-grade risk controls.

### Developers & Protocols (Integration + Extensibility)
**Top 3 features to emphasize:**
1. Hook architecture + Uniswap v4 composability
2. Custom adapters for new yield protocols
3. On-chain position tracking (NFT) + programmatic access

**Include:** Technical architecture, extensibility examples, integration patterns.

## Copy Duration by Content Type

| Type | Length | Features to Emphasize | Examples |
|------|--------|----------------------|----------|
| **Hero tagline** | 5–8 words | Lead benefit ("Yield Without Limits") | "Idle USDC never sleeps" |
| **Hero headline** | 1–2 sentences | Benefit + mechanism ("Earn yield on out-of-range positions automatically") | "Your liquidity works 24/7. Even when out of range." |
| **Hero subheading** | 2–3 sentences | How it works for user + CTA intent | "Deposit USDC to open a position. StableStream routes idle capital to Compound or Aave when you're out of range — earning real yield." |
| **Feature description** | 1 paragraph (50–80 words) | Benefit, mechanism, institution credibility | See examples above |
| **CTA Button** | 2–4 words | Action-oriented, low friction | "Connect Wallet", "Start Earning", "Explore Now" |
| **Email opener** | 1 sentence | Benefit + urgency/opportunity | "Your idle positions are leaving money on the table." |
| **Social post** | 1–2 sentences + emoji/trend | Hook + benefit | "Out-of-range Uniswap positions miss 100% of the yield they don't earn. Not with StableStream. 🚀" |

---

*Use this matrix to ensure copy is feature-accurate, benefits-focused, and audience-appropriate.*
